title: Vitest setup file with external mocks and database wrapper
purpose: Configures Vitest test environment by mocking external dependencies like mermaid and bun:sqlite to enable isolated testing.
module_context: Sets up global mocks for testing environment including mermaid and bun:sqlite database wrapper.

steps.content: Initialize the underlying better-sqlite3 database with the provided file path.
Store the database instance for use in query methods.

methods.name: query
methods.normalized_params: (sql: string): { get: (...params: any[]) => any; all: (...params: any[]) => any; run: (...params: any[]) => any }

steps.content: Prepare a SQL statement using the underlying database.
Return an object with methods to execute the prepared statement with different result types.
Prepare a SQL statement using the underlying database.
Execute the prepared statement with the provided parameters.
Execute the provided SQL statement directly on the underlying database.
